title: Financially-material datasets with departed/implicated owners
narrative: Ownership forensics over the DataHub estate found 3 dataset(s) whose accountable owner is departed and/or implicated in the public record, without certification: finance.executive_summary_report (owner: andrew.fastow -- owner implicated (public record); owner departed; financially material; not certified); finance.restatement_events (owner: richard.causey -- owner implicated (public record); owner departed; financially material; not certified); finance.spe_entities (owner: richard.causey -- owner implicated (public record); owner departed; financially material; not certified). An uncertified, financially-material report owned by an indicted officer has no accountable steward -- figures derived from it cannot be attested. Recommend ownership transfer to an active steward and certification review before any downstream use.
